recommendations.title: Made in Italy
recommendations.overview: A bohemian artist travels from London to Italy with his estranged son to sell the house they inherited from his late wife.

recommendations.title: Warning
recommendations.overview: Loneliness, death and the meaning of life, explored through vastly separate lives colliding in interweaving short stories set in future Earth.

recommendations.title: Guernica
recommendations.overview: The fates of Henry - an American correspondent - and Teresa, one of the Republic's censors during the Spanish Civil War.

recommendations.title: Children of the Corn III: Urban Harvest
recommendations.overview: After a couple adopts a pair of orphaned brothers, it becomes alarmingly clear the boys are much more than they seem.

recommendations.title: The Last Man
recommendations.overview: Tov Matheson is a war veteran with PTSD who perceives that the apocalypse is coming. After starting a relationship with a dubious Messiah, he leaves his normal life and begins the construction of a shelter underground, training himself, in an extreme

recommendations.title: Terminator 2: Judgment Day
recommendations.overview: Ten years after the events of the original, a reprogrammed T-800 is sent back in time to protect young John Connor from the shape-shifting T-1000. Together with his mother Sarah, he fights to stop Skynet from triggering a nuclear apocalypse.

recommendations.title: I Love You, Beth Cooper
recommendations.overview: A valedictorian's declaration of love for a high-school cheerleader launches a night of revelry, reflection and romance for a group of graduating seniors.

recommendations.title: Angry Video Game Nerd: The Movie
recommendations.overview: Based on the hit web series of the same name, a disgruntled gamer must overcome his fear of the worst video game of all time in order to save his fans. Hilarity ensues as a simple road trip becomes an extravagant pursuit of the unexpected.

recommendations.title: Flashbacks of a Fool
recommendations.overview: An aging Hollywood star, Joe Scott, lives a life of narcissistic hedonism, observed by his laconic personal assistant, Ophelia. The death of his childhood best friend, Boots, takes our protagonist, and the movie, into an extended flashback to a sea-s

recommendations.title: I Am Mother
recommendations.overview: A teenage girl is raised underground by a robot "Mother", designed to repopulate the earth following an extinction event. But their unique bond is threatened when an inexplicable stranger arrives with alarming news.
